show_cover_art.label: Show cover art
show_cover_art.description: Replace the play/pause icon with the track's (rounded) cover art when available.

show_progress_bar.label: Show progress bar
show_progress_bar.description: Show a playback-position bar next to the icon. It's a rendered image (not text), so it never affects the widget's Font setting -- when cover art is on, the bar sits beside the art; when off, it replaces the play/pause glyph.

compact_width.label: Compact width (characters)
compact_width.description: Text width when not hovering. The text only actually shrinks to this if it's longer -- a short title just stays put.

expand_width.label: Expanded width (characters)
expand_width.description: Text width while hovering. If the title is still longer than this, it scrolls as a marquee instead of growing further.

cover_size.label: Cover art size (px)
cover_size.description: Size of the cover art icon in place of the play/pause glyph.
